creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Hey,

I have solved it long time ago (Aug 3rd) in MarcusCom CVS ports-stable.

http://www.marcuscom.com:8080/cgi-bin/cvsweb.cgi/ports-stable/www/mozplugger/

Pretty easy to patch it by:

post-patch:
	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|"/etc|"${PREFIX}/etc|g' \
		${WRKSRC}/mozplugger.c

All of that MarcusCom CVS ports-stable stuff will be merging into FreeBSD  
ports tree when it's complete unfreeze.

Cheers,
Mezz


-- 
mezz7@cox.net  -  mezz@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD GNOME Team
http://www.FreeBSD.org/gnome/  -  gnome@FreeBSD.org
